category_sources: source_facts.description says it enables SSH with OpenID Connect; official README describes SSH access managed via OIDC identities instead of long-lived SSH keys.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title uses "opkssh (OpenPubkey SSH)"; source_facts.name is opkssh.
docs_sources: Official opkssh README is the primary usage documentation; scripts/installing.md is official server install documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/openpubkey/opkssh, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable identify OIDC SSH CLI; official README describes OpenID Connect identities, SSH login, provider configuration, and key generation.
